Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to inform email content.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Receives the AI-generated email content via API and sends it to the configured R1 Concepts contact lists.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot to queue them for AI classification and response drafting.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all in-box flyer return and issue form submissions from HubSpot, filtering for relevant Amazon-related entries.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity logs to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Planned customer-facing AI agent to handle R1 Concepts customer inquiries and support interactions autonomously.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will reduce inbound support volume handled by humans and provide 24/7 customer service coverage at scale.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and listings daily to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates contact email addresses for the identified businesses to enable direct outreach.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates end-to-end daily lead gen and outreach for the sublet, creating a consistent stream of warm conversations with zero manual effort.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls current campaign performance data across all R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, and ACOS.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers expert-level ad analysis instantly, enabling data-driven optimizations that improve ROAS and reduce wasted spend across both brands.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube using provided keywords to surface relevant content creators and retrieve their channel metadata and performance stats.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Instantly surfaces a broad pool of relevant creators from YouTube, replacing hours of manual search with an automated keyword-driven scan.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Retrieves matching creator profiles and content data from Instagram based on the same keyword criteria.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands discovery across Instagram simultaneously, ensuring no high-fit creator is missed due to platform siloes.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Synthesizes creator data from all sources and filters results by relevance, audience fit, and content alignment with the brand's keywords.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Reduces a raw list of hundreds of creators down to a curated, high-relevance shortlist, saving significant manual vetting time.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche relevance, audience demographics, and follower count.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective creator shortlist aligned to campaign goals, enabling faster and more confident partnership decisions.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves stored creator profiles, outreach sequences, and prompt templates from Google Drive to feed into the AI model.
Creator Outreach.impact: Centralizes all creator data and messaging frameworks in one place, ensuring the AI always uses the most current targeting criteria and brand voice.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each qualified creator by applying learned sequences and prompts against their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces highly tailored outreach at scale, replacing hours of manual copywriting and improving response rates through relevant personalization.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the brand email account.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates high-volume creator outreach delivery without manual sending, enabling the team to contact hundreds of creators simultaneously while maintaining a personal feel.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email conversations, negotiation outcomes, and learned response patterns to build context for the AI.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds the AI in real past negotiations, ensuring replies mirror proven communication styles and deal structures that have worked before.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator replies and generates contextually appropriate negotiation or follow-up responses based on learned conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Eliminates manual back-and-forth drafting, allowing the team to manage a high volume of active creator conversations without growing headcount.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or drafts the AI-generated negotiation response back to the creator within the existing email thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps response times fast and conversations moving toward deal closure, reducing creator drop-off caused by slow communication.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Reads the MHM vehicle data and New Availability Guide, then matches part numbers to generate the formatted load sheet for the week.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Replaces manual cross-referencing of two large data sources, cutting load sheet preparation from hours to seconds with zero lookup errors.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates the Must Have Monday HubSpot email draft, attaching the generated sales sheet and load sheet for the weekly send.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Automates email build and asset attachment, ensuring the Monday send is consistently ready without manual template assembly each week.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a notification to the relevant Teams channel confirming the email has been created and is ready for review or send.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps the marketing team instantly informed when the weekly email is ready, removing the need for manual status check-ins.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling product launch email copy and monthly recap narratives based on new product data and campaign context provided as input.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces launch-ready email content instantly, freeing copywriters from repetitive product announcement drafting and accelerating time-to-send for new launches.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates fully formatted First to Market email drafts in HubSpot, populating them with AI-generated copy, sales sheets, and campaign assets.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers a review-ready HubSpot email draft without any manual build time, allowing the team to approve and send new product emails the same day they launch.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, email performance data, and contact growth figures for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Eliminates manual HubSpot data exports, ensuring lifecycle metrics in the deck are always accurate and up to date without spreadsheet copying.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts SMS campaign performance metrics including send volume, click rates, and revenue attribution for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Captures SMS channel performance automatically, giving a complete cross-channel picture without manual report pulls from the Attentive dashboard.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves website traffic, session data, conversion metrics, and channel attribution for the monthly period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Feeds accurate web performance data directly into the deck, replacing the error-prone process of manually screenshotting or copying GA4 figures.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics from HubSpot, Attentive, GA4, and Search Console into slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck with formatted charts and labels.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automates the most time-intensive section of the monthly deck, saving several hours of manual data entry and formatting while ensuring consistent slide design.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps by comparing R1 Concepts' current search rankings against competitor performance data to surface high-opportunity topics.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints exactly which keywords competitors rank for that R1 Concepts does not, ensuring every blog produced targets real traffic and revenue opportunities.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Produces full SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps, structured for Yoast SEO best practices and automotive buyer intent.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including title tag, meta description, and focus keyword.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Completes end-to-end content production without manual CMS work, allowing R1 Concepts to publish optimized articles continuously and compound organic search traffic.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor details, order dates, expected delivery dates, and outstanding line items.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts uploaded MHM vehicle part number lists and New Availability Guide files, then matches part numbers between the two datasets entirely in the browser.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Uses Chrome browser automation to log into Attentive, locate the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clone it as the new week's campaign.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC customer sales transaction data including order history, product lines purchased, order frequency, and last purchase dates.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides a complete sales history foundation that makes customer segmentation, reorder timing, and win-back targeting accurate rather than based on guesswork.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers based on purchase behavior, updates contact records with segment tags, and enrolls customers into reorder reminders, cross-sell, or win-back email sequences.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking and ensures the automation triggers only when fresh session data is available, saving 15–20 minutes of coordination per week.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a public download URL to replace the previous week's link.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download URL, and schedules the send for Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistently branded weekly email to the full list on schedule with zero manual build time, protecting engagement and open rates.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully structured B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — based on keyword strategy and content briefs.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready SEO content at scale without writer overhead, consistently targeting high-intent search queries that drive qualified traffic.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog post and publishes it with proper SEO formatting, categories, and metadata applied.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Keeps DFC's blog consistently updated with optimized content, building domain authority and organic rankings over time without manual publishing effort.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style videos on the target vehicle, pulls reference images from Bing Images, and retrieves vehicle history and specs from Wikipedia and Wikimedia Commons.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research by instantly compiling all visual and contextual reference material needed to produce an informed, on-brand video about any vehicle.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Uses the scraped vehicle data, specs, and competitive context to write a complete Friction Friday-style YouTube script including intro hook, brake system breakdown, and outro.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the AI-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a configured brand voice.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Logs the completed video package — script, voiceover link, thumbnail asset, and assembled video file — into a structured Google Sheet row via Apps Script webhook for review and publishing.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows and audits enrollment triggers, logic branches, delays, and email sequences for gaps or inefficiencies.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts Dream CustomerIDs along with associated contact identifiers such as name, email, and account status from the ERP system.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, clicks, and average position data for all DFC blog URLs.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDF attachments and extracts them for processing.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Ensures only high-intent prospects who visited specific product or service pages are entered into nurture sequences, improving email relevance and conversion rates.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives incoming customer support requests and captures the raw ticket content including issue description, order details, and customer identity.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the monthly new arrivals file from Gerrit Young and triggers the automation pipeline to begin content distribution.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the existing NAG email template, populates it with the new arrivals content, and schedules or sends to the target email list.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies and enrolls prospective shipping carriers into an outreach sequence, automatically sending RFQ emails with relevant shipment requirements.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls current week performance data across all three paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Extracts full-month performance data across all paid channels, compiling spend, results, and efficiency metrics for the reporting period.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Structures the monthly data into slide-ready narratives, formats key metrics, and writes contextual commentary aligned to the end-of-month deck format.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Delivers the completed monthly report to the appropriate stakeholders, ready to be dropped into the end-of-month slide deck.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a contact completes the Amazon flyer warranty registration and tags them as a qualified customer for audience syndication.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Pulls active ad copy and corresponding performance metrics across both platforms, flagging ads that fall below defined performance thresholds.

Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Keeps the team consistently informed of copy issues and improvement opportunities without requiring anyone to manually run account audits each cycle.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors task activity across projects, detecting updates, new assignments, blockers, or approaching deadlines that require attention.
Asana Agent.impact: Maintains continuous visibility into project status without manual check-ins, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks across active workstreams.

Asana Agent.action: Synthesizes Asana task data into a prioritized summary, identifying critical items, overdue tasks, and recommended next actions.

Asana Agent.action: Delivers the synthesized Asana summary and recommended actions to the relevant team lead or project owner.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting, extracting all discussed action items, owners, and deadlines.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Ensures every commitment made in the meeting is captured accurately and immediately, eliminating the risk of tasks being forgotten or misattributed after the call.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Routes the raw meeting notes or transcript to the processing pipeline, serving as the handoff point into Claude for structured extraction.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Parses the meeting notes and extracts structured tasks with assigned owners, due dates, and project context ready for Asana entry.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Eliminates the manual effort of translating meeting notes into tasks, reducing post-meeting admin time and ensuring tasks are formatted consistently for project tracking.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls performance data and ad copy from all active search ad campaigns, flagging ads that fall below defined performance thresholds such as low CTR or conversion rate.

Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Puts a ready-to-act optimization report directly in the team's inbox, eliminating the need to log into the ad platform to find problems and draft solutions.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the current state of the Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent entries, status fields, update timestamps, and progress notes into a structured data payload.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Transforms the raw sheet data into a clean, human-readable weekly update summary organized by status, highlighting what's live, what's in progress, and what needs attention.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Converts a dense spreadsheet into a polished executive-ready update in seconds, saving whoever would have written the summary 20–30 minutes each week.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Delivers the formatted weekly agent tracker update to the relevant stakeholders as a clean, structured email digest.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Ensures the whole team stays aligned on automation progress without requiring a meeting or manual report, keeping visibility high with zero overhead.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification — make, model, year, and any relevant notes — through a HubSpot form, which triggers the downstream workflow.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Creates a simple, repeatable submission interface for Mark that kicks off the entire catalog process without requiring him to contact anyone or access backend systems.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries DFC's Dream inventory system using the submitted vehicle specs to retrieve all matching parts currently in stock and identify gaps where inventory is missing.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls a complete inventory picture for the requested vehicle in moments, a lookup that would otherwise require manual cross-referencing across catalogs.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats and structures the raw inventory query results into a clean, organized Excel-ready output with clear sections for stocked parts and inventory gaps.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Transforms a raw data dump into a professionally structured file Mark can immediately use for sales conversations, without manual formatting work.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file with stocked and missing inventory clearly laid out for the submitted vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of his form submission, enabling faster customer quotes and sales follow-up.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit information for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a process where a dozen people independently look up the same parts, consolidating all lookups into a single automated pull that takes seconds instead of hours.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each row of the weekly backorder report with the live Dream inventory data, flagging any parts with no source available as dead-ends requiring escalation.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Produces a fully enriched, actionable backorder report automatically, giving the team instant clarity on what can be fulfilled and what needs intervention.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Sends draft customer communications for backordered items directly to the responsible team members, pre-written with accurate status details pulled from the enriched report.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the manual effort of writing individual customer update emails, ensuring faster and more consistent customer communication across all open backorders.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitments, capturing make, model, year, and part details for each listing.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles a comprehensive multi-brand fitment reference that would take days to build manually, giving DFC a complete view of the two-piece rotor market in one pass.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitments against DFC's existing parts catalog and writes a structured output sheet showing coverage matches and gaps for Dino's review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has competitive coverage and where product gaps exist, giving the team a data-driven foundation for sourcing and inventory decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to target customers to gather demand data on two-piece rotor fitments, asking which vehicles they need covered.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real customer demand signals at scale without manual outreach effort, ensuring the final catalog is shaped by actual market need.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields, extracting the full text from every headline, description, and body copy running across campaigns.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility into live ad copy across all platforms in a single pull, eliminating the need to manually open and read individual ads one by one.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every extracted copy field for the specified target phrases and flags each match with the exact ad, field name, and verbatim copy where the phrase appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a problematic or targeted phrase across all active ads instantly, a review that could take an analyst hours to do manually across large accounts.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted flagged list to the requester showing every ad where a match was found, including the platform, ad ID, field name, and exact copy snippet.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable compliance or quality report directly to the right person, enabling fast decisions on which ads need to be paused or edited.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is in strong shape, with 27 of 55 total agents completed, 11 actively in progress, and 17 more planned for future development. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages — the team is heads-down executing on what's already in motion. With over half the pipeline now fully deployed and running across email, SMS, paid media, SEO, sales, and support, the foundation we've built continues to deliver real daily value across the organization. Exciting work remains ahead as in-progress builds like the R1 Customer Agent, Amazon Ads AI, and the Friction Friday Video Automation move closer to completion — great momentum heading into the weeks ahead!
